name: SuperWater
description: Accurately predict water molecule positions around protein. Achieves water localization within 0.3 +/- 0.06 A of experimentally validated positions. Tested using case studies for protein hydration, protein-ligand binding, and protein-protein binding sites.
capabilities: Accurately predict water molecule positions around protein
Achieves water localization within 0.3 +/- 0.06 A of experimentally validated positions
Tested using case studies for protein hydration, protein-ligand binding, and protein-protein binding sites

pdb_file.description: Protein structure in PDB format for water molecule position prediction
